===================
===================
=== Bob Dylan Rome 06-19-84.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan & Mick Taylor (former Rolling Stones guitarist)
06/19/84
Palaeur
Rome, Italy

Converted by:	Fendert
Conversion:	Tape>?x>CDR>Wav>FLAC
Quality:	Excellent / Soundboard

DO NOT CONVERT TO .MP3 OR ANY OTHER LOSSY FORMAT

This is the 16th Show of Bob Dylan's 1984 tour with former Rolling Stones guitarist 
Mick Taylor.  This is the only (to my useless and pointless knowledge) line recording of 
an entire concert from any of the 1984 shows.  This is reportedly Dylan's monitor feed; 
which is interesting because of the mix.  We get more keyboard then we have heard the 
entire tour.  Mick Taylor interestingly enough is hardly audible, especially at the 
beginning.  You can hear him a little better as the show goes on.  It's a real shame he is 
turned down so low because he is playing brilliantly.  Dylan of course is very prominent 
and you can really hear the echo on his voice on "I and I" very well. It's really cool to 
hear that because on outtakes of the song from the recording sessions there is an echo that 
is used.  It is Interesting that they did it during the tour.  Makes you wonder if Dylan 
really liked it.  The acoustic stuff is all great.  I'm tired and hung-over so that is the 
review for this one . . . oh yeah, Santana sucks!  Lol  Right now is the 20th Anniversary 
of those shows and I thought it would be cool to release each show to STG on the date of 
the actual show plus 20 years.  So, here is the sixteenth show; only 11 more!!!  We'll see 
if I can keep up with the rest of the tour.  So far so good!

HAS ANYONE BEEN ABLE TO LISTEN TO ALL OF THESE SO FAR????


Disc 1
101.	Highway 61 Revisited
102.	Jokerman
103.	All Along The Watchtower 
104.	Just Like A Woman 
105.	Maggie's Farm 
106.	I And I  
107.	License To Kill 
108.	Imagination
109.	A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall (acoustic) 
110.	Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic)
111.	It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) 


Disc 2
201.	Simple Twist Of Fate
202.	Masters Of War 
203.	Ballad Of A Thin Man 
204.	When You Gonna Wake Up 
205.	Every Grain Of Sand 
206.	Like A Rolling Stone 
207.	Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic) 
208.	It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic) 
209.	The Times They Are A-Changin' 
210.	I Shall Be Released 
211.	Tombstone Blues 
212.	Blowin' In The Wind
===================
